claims.summary: Telemetry reception and cooperative shutdown share an asynchronous select loop.
claims.disposition: Verified; shutdown has a dedicated branch and closes the WebSocket cooperatively.

claims.summary: Shared-state lock delay needs to be visible separately from packet handling.
claims.disposition: Verified through telemetry integration health fields and tests for prewrite, write-lock wait, and lock-hold timing.

claims.summary: Lock contention causes the reported restless shadow texture.
claims.disposition: Not established; routed to a bounded flooded-lane/shutdown and timing observation without treating timing correlation as felt causation.

claims.summary: Replace the RwLock or batch telemetry updates.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because state ownership, batching, and update cadence change live telemetry integration behavior.
